name: Evergreen Home Loans Las Vegas NMLS 348986
description_short: Evergreen Home Loans is a mortgage lender operating in Las Vegas offering home purchase and refinance loans with a focus on fast closing and transparent service.
description_long:
Evergreen Home Loans is a residential mortgage lending company with a Las Vegas office (NMLS# 348986) located at 8945 W. Russell Rd., Suite 210. The company operates as part of a larger national mortgage platform with multiple locations and a stated mission to deliver services "On Time and as Promised" with complete transparency throughout the home purchase process. Their Las Vegas branch maintains standard business hours Monday through Friday, 8:00 am to 5:00 pm, with a team of nine licensed loan officers and two branch managers serving the Nevada market.

Evergreen Home Loans offers traditional mortgage products including home purchase loans and refinancing options. The company features CashUp® by Evergreen, a proprietary offering that appears designed to help borrowers compete in competitive real estate markets by streamlining the approval and closing process. Customers can access loan applications online through their Loan Application Portal, manage existing loans through their Loan Service Portal, and utilize online calculators to estimate costs. The company employs loan officers across multiple experience levels, from senior mortgage planners to entry-level loan officers, all NMLS-licensed.

The company distinguishes itself through its emphasis on speed and reliability, marketing closing timelines as competitive (10 business days referenced in customer testimonial) and positioning CashUp® as a competitive advantage in purchase negotiations. The brand emphasizes professional service and customer confidence-building throughout the transaction process. They provide multiple contact methods including phone, fax, and online portals for application and account management.

As a regional office of a larger mortgage company, Evergreen operates within standard mortgage lending parameters. While they offer online application and account management tools, the actual range of loan products, interest rates, and specific underwriting criteria are not detailed on the Las Vegas office page. The company functions as a traditional mortgage lender and should be evaluated based on current rates, fees, and specific loan product availability compared to other lenders.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Licensed and regulated with published NMLS number (348986) and individual loan officer NMLS credentials
Online loan application and account management portals available for convenience
CashUp® by Evergreen product designed to accelerate closing and improve competitiveness in purchase offers
Multiple experienced loan officers and branch managers on staff with varying NMLS credentials
Established brand with multiple office locations beyond Las Vegas
Standard business hours with accessible phone and fax contact methods
cons: Website does not disclose current interest rates, fees, or loan product specifications
Limited transparency about specific loan types offered (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, etc.)
No published customer reviews or ratings visible on the office page
Las Vegas office operates limited hours (8am-5pm weekdays only, closed weekends)
No information about minimum credit score requirements, down payment options, or approval criteria
best_for: Las Vegas-area homebuyers seeking fast mortgage closing timelines
Borrowers in competitive real estate markets who want to strengthen purchase offers
Homeowners seeking refinancing with established lenders offering online account management
Real estate buyers who prefer working with a local branch manager and established team
diagnosis: Evergreen Home Loans Las Vegas is best for borrowers in the Las Vegas area seeking traditional mortgage products with an emphasis on fast closing timelines and online convenience. Primary caveat: the office website lacks critical details about current rates, fees, specific loan products available, and underwriting requirements—prospective borrowers must contact the office directly to compare offers and understand pricing before proceeding.
services: CashUp® by Evergreen competitive offer product
Online loan document signing and submission
Multi-location mortgage services across Nevada and other states
Professional loan officer and support team services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 8945 W Russell Rd Suite 210, Las Vegas, NV 89148
